# Week Review — April 13–17, 2026
*Generated by Paw 🐾 | Friday, April 17, 2026 | 5:00 PM MYT*

---

## 🏆 WINS

- **CEO OS Brain went fully live.** Orchestrator cron, watchdog cron, DAILY_CONTEXT.md, SYSTEM_STATE.json, decision index, and #brain-sync feedback loop all operational. Paw is now context-aware on every session — no more running blind.
- **Spartan Race Philippines is officially powered by FMS.** Pasig Event Weekend confirmed. One of SEA's most recognizable obstacle/endurance brands is now a reference customer.
- **Video Highlights has a live pilot target.** Pitched to Doc Marc & Sir Nico (Spartan PH) during post-mortem — they want a demo May 14, with a July event as pilot. First real path to validating Video Highlights as a revenue stream.
- **Q1 2026 baseline established.** ₱12M GMV, ₱2.93M FMS revenue, 120 events, 1.13% conversion across 8M photos. First clean financial baseline in company history.
- **Malaysia competitive map is clear.** JomRun IPix, RaceSniper, VE Picture identified — threat levels assessed before Q3 SEA entry.
- **Subagent templates formalized.** Competitor intel and financial modeling specialists now templated — main session stays focused on strategy.
- **Discord channel architecture cleaned up.** Scheduled vs. working channels clearly delineated. System is organized.
- **HOKA Midnight Run Asia identified as a major BD target.** 6-city PH series, premium brand, high photo-spend audience — ready for Lenli to chase.

---

## 📚 LESSONS LEARNED

- **One signature is too much concentration risk.** The entire Q3 strategy (₱5.6M/month, SEA exclusivity, SEC filing, hiring plan) sits behind Rio signing one document. Plan B has not been written. This is a structural vulnerability that needs to be corrected regardless of how April 19 goes.
- **The CEO OS only works if the CEO feeds it.** Most Howlers and ThursDEVS debriefs this week had no Van input ("no action points for me"). The brain is only as good as what goes in. Capture discipline needs to improve.
- **Tim's silence on prepay scoping is a slow-moving crisis.** Every week it's not scoped is a week of Q3 risk accumulating. No estimate = no accountability = July/August slip is increasingly likely.
- **Spartan is a relationship, not just a client.** They gave product feedback, requested features, and explored two new product lines (Videos, ZONE). This requires Van's personal attention, not just Tim's execution.
- **FMS has zero SEA search presence.** GeoSnapShot owns "race photography Southeast Asia" by default. FMS only ranks for PH queries. Before Q3 SEA push, content and landing pages are required — this should've started already.

---

## 🔄 CARRY OVER TO NEXT WEEK

- **Rio signing — April 19 is 2 days away.** Van must confirm status personally. If there's any hesitation, escalate to Dave immediately. Plan B needs to exist in writing by Monday.
- **Tim: scope the prepay integration.** One rough-estimate meeting. Must happen this week or Q3 slips.
- **Video Highlights demo prep (May 14 target).** Tim owns polish; Van owns the deadline. Check in this week.
- **Baseline revenue per event calculation — due April 30.** Delegate to team now.
- **Bot channel permissions still broken.** Reports still posting to #general instead of scheduled channels. Fix the bot permissions in Discord server settings.
- **HOKA Midnight Run Asia BD outreach.** Lenli should initiate contact — 6-city series is a strong early target before Q3.
- **SEO gap fix.** Start SEA-focused landing pages and blog content. GeoSnapShot is winning the category by default.
- **ZONE for Spartan — watch for signal.** If they move forward, Van needs to make a dev resource decision fast.

## 🧠 DECISIONS MADE THIS WEEK

- **CEO OS Orchestration Architecture** (Apr 13) — Built centralized brain with orchestrator/watchdog crons, DAILY_CONTEXT.md, SYSTEM_STATE.json, #brain-sync channel, decision index. Two-way data flow now live.
- **Discord Channel Roles** (Apr 13) — Scheduled channels = reports only. Working channels = sessions. #brain-sync = feedback loop.
- **Paw Subagent Templates** (Apr 13) — Competitor intel and financial modeling specialists templated in `subagent-templates/`. Main session reserved for strategy.
- **Video Highlights = Dedicated Revenue Stream** (Apr 14, confirmed by Van) — Not just a feature add-on. Target: demo May 14 → pilot July event (Spartan PH).

## 💬 Paw's Take

Solid infrastructure week — the brain is live, the baseline is set, and Spartan gave us a real product pilot to chase. But the Rio dependency is still a single point of failure that nobody has written a Plan B for, and Tim's silence on prepay scoping is the quiet risk that could quietly wreck Q3. Fix those two things Monday and this week becomes a real foundation.
